mapper.select:
select * from store
AND storeId in (${value})
AND storeId in (-1)

select * from store
AND storeAddrId in (${value})
AND storeAddrId in (-1)
select TRUNCATE(#{money}*nextVal/100,2) from data_map where idxLabel=2 and nextLabel=3 and price=#{grade}
select nextVal from data_map where idxLabel=2 and nextLabel=3 and price=#{grade}
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET storeAddrId = #{storeId} WHERE storeId = #{storeId}
mapper.delete:
delete from store where storeId in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from arrange_class ac inner join stu_privateclass_ship sps on sps.spsId = ac.spsId left join coach co on co.coachId = ac.coachId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = ac.studentId
ac.classPlaceId = #{classPlaceId}
and ac.classStatus = #{classStatus}
AND co.storeId in (${storeIds})
and sps.orderNo = trim(#{orderNo})
and ui.phone = trim(#{stuPhone})
and co.phone = trim(#{coachPhone})

select ac.arrangeClassId, sps.orderNo, sps.orderType, sps.energy, ac.className, ac.coachId, co.userId, co.grade, ac.price, ac.duration, ac.studentId from arrange_class ac inner join stu_privateclass_ship sps on sps.spsId=ac.spsId inner join coach co on co.coachId = ac.coachId where ac.arrangeClassId = #{arrangeClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ac.classStatus = 0

select cp.cpsId, cp.grade, cp.storeName, cp.createdDate, co.coachName, co.phone as coachPhone, co.sex, (select ui.userSign from user_info ui where ui.userId=co.userId) as introduction from coach_place_ship cp inner join coach co on co.coachId = cp.coachId
cp.storeId = #{storeId}
AND cp.storeId in (${storeIds})
and cp.storeName like concat ('%',trim(#{storeName}),'%')
and co.coachName like concat ('%',trim(#{coachName}),'%')
and co.phone like concat ('%',trim(#{coachPhone}),'%')
order by cp.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

select count(*) from coach_place_ship cp inner join coach co on co.coachId = cp.coachId
cp.storeId = #{storeId}
AND cp.storeId in (${storeIds})
and co.coachName = trim(#{coachName})
and co.phone = trim(#{coachPhone})
select storeAddrId from store_address where storeId = #{storeId}
mapper.update:
update stu_teamclass_ship set classStatus = 2 where stuTeamClassId in
#{stuTeamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update stu_teamclass_ship set classStatus = 1 where stuTeamClassId in
#{stuTeamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select sts.studentId, sts.classTime, tc.energy from stu_teamclass_ship sts INNER JOIN team_class tc on tc.teamClassId=sts.classId where sts.stuTeamClassId = #{stuTeamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from card_order where storeAddressId = (select s.storeAddrId from store_address s where s.storeId=#{storeId})
mapper.update: update user_info set wristId=null,faceStatus=0 where wristId in (select d.deviceNo from device d inner join store_address s on s.storeAddrId=d.storeAddressId where s.storeId=#{storeId})
mapper.delete: delete from device where storeAddressId = (select s.storeAddrId from store_address s where s.storeId=#{storeId})
delete from arrange_class where classPlaceId = (select s.storeAddrId from store_address s where s.storeId=#{storeId})
delete from store_attention where storeGroupId = (select s.storeGroupId from store_group s where s.storeId=#{storeId})
delete from dynamic_evaluate where dynamicId in (select d.dynamicId from dynamic d inner join store_group s on s.storeGroupId=d.socialGroupId where s.storeId=#{storeId})
delete from dynamic where socialGroupId = (select s.storeGroupId from store_group s where s.storeId=#{storeId})
mapper.update: update store set status=#{status} where storeId=#{storeId}
update store_address set status=#{status} where storeId=#{storeId}
update store_group set status=#{status} where storeId=#{storeId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from data_map where idxLabel=2 and nextLabel=3 and price=#{grade}
